title: Igluu Meal Prep Round Glass Containers with Lids (3 Pack) – Airtight & BPA-Free – Oven, Microwave, Freezer and Dishwasher Safe – 400ml, 650ml, 950ml – Durable Borosilicate Glass
features: Healthy Food On The Go: Never has it been so simple and nutritious to eat on the go; Just prepare food ahead of time or store leftovers in these airtight, leak-proof glass food storage containers; Take to the office, work, gym or eat on-the-go; Snap lock lids create an airtight seal for secure, leak-free storage

Round Multi-Sized Glass Containers: Three versatile sizes, ideal for fruit, salad, snacks, soup and more; Nonporous glass won’t absorb food odours, flavours, or stains and BPA-free polypropylene lid is odourless, leaving food tasting just the way you prepared it; Container sizes: 400ml / 14oz = 13.5 cm (d) x 6.1 cm (h), 650ml / 22oz= 15.4 cm (d) x 6.8 cm (h), 950ml / 32oz = 17.7 cm (d) x 7.4 cm (h)

Meal Prep & Portion Control: Stay healthy and save time by cooking and freezing healthy home-made meals for later; Each container is perfectly proportioned to help you keep control of your food portions and stick to your diet plan; Snap locking lid and silicone seal keeps food free from outside bacteria; Store your meal in the fridge or freezer and enjoy as a microwave meal for lunch the next day

Oven, Microwave & Freezer Safe: Made from durable high- quality borosilicate glass, which is stronger than standard tempered glass; Designed to withstand high and low temperatures, so you can reheat or cook your food directly in them; They are freezer safe too

Dishwasher Safe & Space Saving: Hinged lids are detachable and silicone seal is removeable for hygienic easy cleaning; Three different sized containers nest inside each other to save you space when storing away
description: Product Description Reach Your Health and Fitness Goals With Igluu Glass Meal Prep Containers ______________ Say hello to Igluu Glass Meal Prep Containers! Have you been searching for ways to reduce single-use plastic in your daily routine? How much simpler would your week become if you had a food storage and preparation solution that let you microwave or oven-cook your meal in the same storage container and easily clean it afterward - without fear of harmful chemicals leaching into your meal? Modernise Your Meals on the Go with This Set of Igluu Meal Prep Glass Food Containers! ______________ Three versatile sizes with snap locking lids and removable seals, gives you all you need to enjoy home-cooked meals on the go or for storing leftovers. These round glass containers will ensure your food stays fresh for longer . Lock in the Freshness : With the SnapLock system, you can be assured that nasty bacteria will stay out here, and your next meal will stay in there. Whether it's weight loss, building muscle, or portion control, Igluu glass meal prep containers will help keep you on track! Say no to disposable plastic containers and use our reusable glass ones instead — they're dishwasher safe and made out of heavy-duty borosilicate glass. They are safe to go in the oven and come with 3 BPA-free plastic airtight lids. . MATERIALS & SAFETY Food safe - made from borosilicate glass. Can withstand temperatures up to 300°C BPA-FREE lids - high-quality & toxic-free Microwave-safe Stain and odour resistant Freezer-friendly Oven Safe - not the lids Dishwasher safe FEATURES Round reusable glass 3 different sizes: Small: 13.5 cm (diameter) x 6.1 cm (h) Medium: 15.4 cm (diameter) x 6.8 cm (h) Large: 17.7 cm (diameter) x 7.4 cm (h) Volume 400ml, 650ml & 950ml Easy to lock – SnapLock on 4 sides Removable silicone seal - super hygienic Clear transparent lids - for perfect visual presentation BUILT FOR MEAL PREPPERS Airtight seal - keeps food fresh for longer Leak-proof – no mess Easy to clean Compact yet deep Portion control – count your macros Versatile container – salad, rice, noodles, porridge and more IGLUU THE BRAND YOU CAN TRUST ______________ After you’ve enjoyed your meal, simply toss the container in the dishwasher (lid on top rack) or quickly wash it in the sink to achieve a brand-new look, feel and smell. You can even remove and wash the seal itself! Now you can easily maintain your diet even when you’re eating away from home; simply create a weekly meal plan and freeze or refrigerate each container until needed. Alternative to single-use plastic: From odour to appearance to health and environmental benefit, glass gets the job done. Join the Igluu Meal Prep family today.
